analysis: Item 19 uses actual historical sales reported by existing non-exclusive territory franchisees for fiscal years 2024 and 2023. The FPR is based on the same royalty rate (7%), brand fee (4%), and fee structure that current new franchisees pay. The FPR population consists of franchisees operating under the same economic terms as new franchisees. There is no pro-forma, illustrative, or comparable cohort using different fee economics.
note: The only difference between existing and new franchisees is that 36 legacy exclusive-territory units are included in the systemwide sales threshold table (Table 4) but excluded from the Group A-D tables. This does not create a comparability issue as the per-group tables are confined to non-exclusive territory units.
